Subject: History_Questions
Question: True or False: Cleopatra was the last active ruler of the Ptolemaic Kingdom of Egypt.
Response1:
False
Cleopatra VII Philopator was indeed the last active ruler of the Ptolemaic Kingdom of Egypt. She reigned from 51 BC to her death in 30 BC after being defeated by Roman forces led by Mark Antony and later Octavian (later known as Augustus).
